atoms.source_snippet: pub enum SequencingRightsError { StateProviderError(String), ContractReadError { contract: Address, reason: String }, DecodeError { contract: Address, reason: String }, OrderingViolation { contract: Address, tx_index: usize, expected_priority: u32, actual_priority: u32 }, EvmError(String), ClassificationError(String) }
atoms.semantic_claim: The old divergence adds the sequencing-rights error surface for state provider failures, contract read/decode failures, ordering violations, EVM errors, and classification errors.
